# Docs/Guides 鈥?Human Navigation

## Purpose
Practical guides for humans working with the Nikolai system 鈥?getting started, adding agents, troubleshooting, and contributing.

## Placement Logic
Under Docs/ because guides are prescriptive documentation. Separated from Architecture/ because guides are task-oriented, not structure-oriented.

## Contents & Conventions
getting-started.md for new users. adding-an-agent.md for extending the swarm. troubleshooting.md for common issues. contributing.md for collaboration standards.
